results.rendered_html: 3. prā Vṛddhi or lengthened form of 1. pra in comp. (cf.  Pāṇ. vi, 3, 122 ). Observe in the following derivatives, only the second member of the simple compound from which they come is given in the parentheses, leaving the preposition pra (lengthened to prā in the derivatives) to be supplied.

results.rendered_html:
1. prā im Veda Nebenform zu 1. par und von gleicher Bedeutung  DHĀTUP. 24,53 . Auf prā gehen folgende Formen zurück: aprās, prāsi, aprāt; aprās 3. sg. aor.; paprau, paprā, paprātha, paprivaṃs, papruṣī; pass. (ā) aprāyi; füllen: prāsyudaram  ṚV. 1,42,9 . 73,8 . 69,1 . 146,1 . 6,17,3 . 8,1,23 .  AV. 13,2,35 . yeṣāmiḻā ghṛtahastā duroṇa ā~ api prātā (partic., = pūrṇā  SĀY. ) niṣīdati  ṚV. 7,16,8 .
— ā erfüllen: viśvamāprā antarikṣaṃ mahitvā  ṚV. 1,52,13 . ā paprau pārthivaṃ rajaḥ 81,5 . 115,1  ( P. 2,4,80 , Sch.). 4,52,5 . 6 . 53,3 . 7,20,4 . 98,8 . 10,127,2 . 134,1 .
